title: Validate Python native TUI against physical LCI firmware
description: Run manual hardware smoke tests for the packaged Python native TUI against real firmware over available LCI transports. Cover IP/CoAP where a local IPv6 path exists and BLE once the BLE ResourceTransport bridge is implemented. Record host OS, adapter/permissions, firmware commit/config, command lines, screenshots/logs, and failures. This is hardware-blocked until boards/adapters/firmware endpoints are available.
